entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop (Arachis hypogaea) studied for yield improvement and physiological traits.

entities.name: ICRISAT ASIA CENTRE
entities.description: The research center where the physiology of groundnut was studied.

entities.name: WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: A physiological trait indicating how efficiently a plant uses water.

entities.name: DRY MATTER PARTITIONING TO PODS
entities.description: The distribution of biomass from the plant to the pods.

entities.name: ROOT SYSTEM EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The effectiveness of the root system in nutrient and water uptake.

entities.name: CARBON ISOTOPE DISCRIMINATION
entities.description: A physiological measure used as a proxy for water use efficiency.

entities.name: SPECIFIC LEAF AREA
entities.description: The ratio of leaf area to leaf dry mass.

entities.name: GENOTYPE BY ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between genetic makeup and environmental conditions affecting trait expression.

entities.name: YIELD IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of increasing the agricultural output of a crop.

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit area.

entities.name: AGROCLIMATIC REQUIREMENTS
entities.description: The specific environmental and climatic conditions needed for optimal crop growth.

entities.name: GENOTYPIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The diversity in genetic makeup among different genotypes of a species.
